summary_en: MBK increased authorized share buyback from ¥500M to ¥820M (2.5M to 4.1M shares) to fund shareholder returns, capital efficiency, and future M&A.
title_en: Notice regarding partial modification (increase) of matters concerning share acquisition
translation_en_brief:
On 18 May 2026, MBK Co., Ltd. (TSE Standard, code 3121) announced a modification to its share buyback program approved by the Board on 12 December 2025. The company increased the total acquisition budget from ¥500 million to ¥820 million and raised the maximum share authorization from 2.5 million shares (8.04% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) to 4.1 million shares (13.37% of issued shares excluding treasury stock). The acquisition period remains 30 January 2026 through 11 December 2026.

The stated rationale encompasses both shareholder returns and capital efficiency improvement, and additionally—as the basis for the increase—preparation for utilization as acquisition funding in future M&A transactions. As of 18 May 2026, the company had already acquired 2,057,000 shares at a total cost of ¥466.2 million under the original authorization, and holds 2,136,706 treasury shares.
